name: Kevin Zhang
currentRole: Senior Vice President of Business Development
connectionToCompany: Primary business development executive overseeing key foundry customers including Apple, managing advanced node engagements for Apple silicon (A-series, M-series chips)
sourceNote: Publicly identified in TSMC press releases and analyst conference materials as SVP of Business Development
verificationNote: Confirmed by Gemini as SVP of Business Development at TSMC.

name: Y.P. Chin
connectionToCompany: Oversees manufacturing operations delivering high-volume production of Apple-designed chips on advanced nodes including 3nm and 4nm processes at TSMC fabs
sourceNote: Referenced in TSMC annual reports and technology symposium proceedings as SVP of Operations
verificationNote: Confirmed by Gemini as SVP of Operations at TSMC.

name: Shang-Yi Chiang
formerRole: Senior Vice President of Research and Development at TSMC
connectionToCompany: Former architect of TSMC process technology roadmap used by Apple; now driving semiconductor strategy at Hon Hai, a major Apple manufacturing partner and supplier
sourceNote: Gemini identifies current role as Semiconductor Strategy Officer at Hon Hai Technology Group; formerly SVP R&D at TSMC
verificationNote: WRONG COMPANY corrected: Gemini indicates Shang-Yi Chiang is currently at Hon Hai Technology Group (Foxconn) as Semiconductor Strategy Officer, not at TSMC. name: Cliff Hou
currentRole: Senior Vice President of Corporate Research

connectionToCompany: Leads R&D on cutting-edge process nodes including N2 (2nm) which Apple is expected to adopt for future A-series and M-series chips; oversees technology co-development relevant to Apple silicon roadmap
sourceNote: Named in TSMC Technology Symposium presentations and industry analyst reports on advanced node development
